docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANGIACOMO, ANGELO AND YVONNE SANGIACOMO AS TRUSTEES OF THE SANGIACOMO FAMILY TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS BROTHERS, INC., A DELAWARE CORP. DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKS BROTHERS, INC., A DELAWARE CORP. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201-209 POST ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, PREMISES INCLUDE THE GROUND/FIRST, SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH FLOOR, MEZZANINE & BASEMENT. EXECUTION MAY PROCEED HOWEVER, IT IS STAYED WITH RESPECT TO THE SECOND FLOOR UNTIL 3/30/00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
